title: I Have Nothing
meaning_summary: I Have Nothing gives The Bodyguard soundtrack a second tracked anchor because it remains one of Whitney Houston's strongest vocal-showcase ballads.
revenue_drivers: The Bodyguard soundtrack halo keeps the song connected to one of the biggest soundtrack catalogs.
Vocal-performance recognition supports covers, auditions, and event-driven listening.
Whitney Houston ballad playlists create steady long-tail replay.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models soundtrack catalog demand, ballad playlist replay, performance-showcase reuse, and label/publishing participation.

ownership.master_owner: Label / soundtrack catalog rightsholder with estate-side participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears shared across credited songwriters and publisher administration
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific catalog-sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Modeled annual range, not a disclosed royalty statement.
